# hetzner_failover (Resource)

Manages failover IP routing for Hetzner dedicated servers.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Routes a failover IP to a specific server.
resource "hetzner_failover" "example" {
  ip            = "203.0.113.100"
  active_server = "203.0.113.1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `active_server_ip` (String) The server IP to route the failover IP to.
- `ip` (String) The failover IP address.

### Read-Only

- `netmask` (String) The failover netmask.
- `server_ip` (String) The owner server main IP.
- `server_ipv6_net` (String) The owner server IPv6 network.
- `server_number` (Number) The owner server number.
